falsification_rule_text: Not supported if (a) β_eu_post_2018 is non-negative or not statistically significant at p<0.10 on at least two of the four outcome measures, OR (b) the effect vanishes after controlling for capital-market depth and VC-raised-as-share-of-GDP, OR (c) placebo at pre-2018 fake date shows a similar-magnitude "effect" (indicating pre-existing trend rather than GDPR), OR (d) the scale-up rate difference is driven by US superstar firms rather than EU-firm scale-up deficit (decomposable via medians vs means). Report honestly if the scale-gap exists but cannot be attributed to regulation specifically — this is a real and legitimate null.
